text.headline: 叩叩魔魔 — KoMo's Journey
text.text: A love story across cities: Hefei, Wuhan, Singapore, Beijing, and the US.

text.headline: Hefei / First Meeting
text.text: February 22, 2024 — where Koko and Momo first met.

text.headline: Wuhan / Together
text.text: March 16-17, 2024 — first held hands, officially became a couple.

text.headline: Singapore / First Trip
text.text: June 2024 — KoMo's first international adventure together.

text.headline: Beijing / Summer Base
text.text: Multiple stays in 2024 and 2025 — Beijing became their summer home.

text.headline: United States / Momo Visits
text.text: February 2026 — Momo travels to the US to visit Koko.
